subject: LU-4976 osp: add comment to osp_dev.c

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(79 comments)

Looks like a very good start.

Richard, it probably makes sense to document the comment styles for methods, functions, arrays, etc. on the wiki page so they are used consistently:

- method_table::method_name
- function_name()
- array_name[]

"negative errno on failure", maybe a list of specific errors if they are unusual

commit.subject: LU-4976 osp: add comment to osp_dev.c
commit.message:
LU-4976 osp: add comment to osp_dev.c

1. Add comments to each function in osp_dev.c.
2. remove unnecessary rc in osp_recovery_complete.
3. remove unnecessary LASSERTF in osp_device_fini.
4. rename some single character variable name to more
   meaningful name, like m-->osp, l-->ld etc
5. rename osp_find_or_create to osp_find_or_create_local_file
   to indicate it is actually for finding or creating a local
   file.
Signed-off-by: wang di <di.wang@intel.com>
